content.speakerText: Your tuition's paid in full, but your housing fee is still pending.
content.speakerTextCn: 学费已付清，但住宿费还没交。

options.text: Can I get a discount instead?
I already paid everything last week.
When is the next semester starting?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I'll pay it online tonight.'是针对欠费情况的合理回应，符合使用说明中'立即询问支付方式'的要求。选项2询问折扣，与缴费义务无关；选项3否认欠费，与事实矛盾；选项4转移话题，未回应核心问题。

content.speakerText: You’ve got a $200 refund due—want it sent to your bank or as a check?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有200美元退款，要打到银行卡还是寄支票？

options.text: Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local address yet.
Can I use it to pay for next term’s tuition?
I think there’s been a mistake—I didn’t overpay.
How long will it take to arrive?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local address yet.'是标准回应之一，符合场景中'根据自身情况选择退款方式'的要求。选项2提出用途变更，属于额外请求，非标准回应；选项3质疑退款合理性，虽可接受但非首选；选项4询问时间，未直接回应选择要求。

content.speakerText: I see your account shows a $50 balance due for the lab fee. Would you like to settle it now?
content.speakerTextCn: 我看到你的账户还欠50美元的实验费，现在要支付吗？

options.text: Yes, I'll pay it by credit card right away.
Can you waive the fee since I'm an international student?
I didn't know there was a lab fee.
When is the next class meeting?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Yes, I'll pay it by credit card right away.'直接回应支付请求，符合确认缴费场景的核心行为。选项2请求减免，属非标准请求；选项3表达惊讶��未解决问题；选项4完全跑题，未回应缴费请求。
